tagline: Classifies, screens and clears imports — a licensed customs broker signs the entry of record.
problem: Customs clearance is high-volume HS classification + denied-party screening under a reasonable-care standard, where a misdeclaration carries 19 USC 1592 penalties.
outcome: Shipments classified, valued and screened straight-through; the licensed broker signs the entry of record before it is filed with CBP.

steps.does: Intake the shipment documents (invoice, packing list, BOL)
Classify the goods (HS / HTSUS) and compute the value and duty
Screen the parties against denied-party / OFAC / Entity List; apply reasonable care + UFLPA
A licensed customs broker signs the entry of record
File the CBP entry via ACE / ABI
Track the entry, post-summary correction and duty drawback
